raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es/ ne muhſcham es/ 
ta' pretti to KUNGU apgrehko-
fchohs / ka es mittetohs preeſch 
jums luhtt / bet es mahzischu 
jums to ihstenu un labbu Zelftu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bihſteetes tikkai to KUNG-
GU/ un kalpojet wiꞥſcham pee-
tizziigi no wiſſas juhsas Sirđs / 
jo juhs effat redſeischi / kahdas 
leelas Leetas wiſch pee jums dar-
rijs irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ja juhs Launumu 
padarriteet/ tad ir juhs/ tr juhsu 
Kehniſch bohja eefeeet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Auls btja uu weenu 
Gaddu par Kehniſu bi-
jiſ/ uu waltija ohtru 
Gaddu pahr Israëlu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad iſlaſtija Sauls ſewim 
trihtuhkfſtoſchus no Israëta/ un 
diwi tuhkſtoschee bija pee Saula 
eeffch Mikmas / us Beteles Kal-
nu Weetaım/ un tuhkſtoschee ar 
Jonatanu eeﬀch Gibejas Benja-
mixa/ un tohs zittus Laudis at-
laide wiſch / ikkatru us faru 
Mahju.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Jonatans kawe to Wi-
listeru Lehgeri Gebâ/ un tee Wi-
listeri eedsirdeja to: Tadeht pu-
te Sauls ar Basunehmzaar wiſ-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad dsirdeja wiſſ Israëte-
fakam: Sauls irr to Wilisteru 
Lehgeri kanis/ir Israëls irr ſmir-
dohts tappis pee teem Wiliste-
reim/ tad tappe tee Laudis fa-
faukti Saulam pakkat uhs Gil-
gatu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Wilisteri fapulzejahē 
prett Israëlu karroht/ trihs tuh-
ſtoſcht Ratti / un ſefchtuhkfſtoſch 
Jahtneeki/ un tik dauds Lauschu/
ka Smiltis Juhr-Malla: un tee 
zehlahs augſcham/un apmette Leh-
Geri pee Mikmafa / Bet-Awe-
nam prett Rihteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad nu tee Israëta Wihr-
redſeja/ ka teem Behdas bija/(jo 
tee Laudis behdajahs) / tad ap-
fiehpahs tee Laudis Allās / un 
Ebrkſchkn Kruhmôs / un Akmi-
nu-Schkirbās / un Stiprumôs/
un Akkās.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Eebreeri zhlehs pah-
to Jardannu uhs to Semmi Ga-
eekich Gilendas / bet Sauls bija 
wehl Gilgalā/ un wiſſi Laudie 
drebbeja pakkat wiſsu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad pagaidija wiſsch ſep-
tin Deenas lihdſtam Laikam/ ka 
Samuels bti lizzis. Bet kad Sa-
muels uhs Gilgalu ne nahze/ tad 
iſkaſſijahs tee Laudis pakkat wiſ-
na nohst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazztja Saulē : Ne-
feet man ſchurp weenu Dedsamo-
Uppuri/ un Pateifschanas-Uppu-
rus: un tas uppureja Dedsamo-
Uppuri.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
